records.title: NBC’s Best Chance to Boost Jimmy Fallon, Seth Meyers May Come During TV’s Slow Summer Cycle

content.summary: Variety reported that Jimmy Fallon and Seth Meyers begin several weeks of summer late-night broadcasts, with The Tonight Show temporarily lacking regular competitors.

records.title: Renée Zellweger, Michael Keaton & Judi Dench Projects Make 2026 HollyShorts Lineup

content.summary: Deadline reported that the 2026 HollyShorts lineup includes Renée Zellweger’s directorial debut and projects featuring Judi Dench, Michael Keaton and Martin Freeman.

records.title: Carrie TV Series' Prom Scene Will Be Completely Different, Says Showrunner Mike Flanagan

content.summary: People reported that Prime Video’s eight-episode Carrie series will premiere in fall 2026 and that Mike Flanagan plans a substantially reworked prom sequence.

records.title: Carrie exclusive first look: How Mike Flanagan gives the Stephen King classic a modern TV twist
